_meta.notes: Content for the Building Beyond the Edge landing page. See README.md for the editor's guide. Fields marked TODO are placeholders that need editor follow-up before publication.

site.title: Building Beyond the Edge | Nasdaq
site.description: As AI powers a new era of economy where infrastructure, intelligence and capital converge, Nasdaq exists to help builders push beyond the edge and enable progress to scale.

hero.headline: Building beyond the Edge.
hero.subhead: The edge isn't the end — it's where building begins.
hero.intro: As AI powers a new era of economy where infrastructure, intelligence and capital converge, Nasdaq exists to help builders push beyond the edge and enable progress to scale.

intelligence.headline: Intelligence as the new operating layer.
intelligence.lede: Artificial intelligence is no longer experimental — it's operational. From machine learning to generative and agentic systems, intelligence is becoming embedded across the real world — powering decisions, automating processes, and shaping how systems behave.

blocks.text: Robotics, and artificial intelligence generally, are truly at the epicenter of the Fourth Industrial Revolution.
blocks.title: Nasdaq Information Services
blocks.sourceLabel: Source — Artificial Intelligence: Industry Report & Investment Case

cards.body: of tech investments are being directed toward AI tools and capabilities on average, based on survey responses from financial institution leaders.

cards.label: Insight
cards.headline: 71% of leaders say their organizations are still in early AI adoption.
cards.body: Despite growing investment, most institutions lack the infrastructure, data, talent, and processes to scale AI effectively. Bridging this gap is critical to realizing returns.

blocks.imageAlt: Total Return Performance: Nasdaq CTA Artificial Intelligence Index (NQINTELT) versus S&P 500 Total Return Index (SPXT), March 2008 through 2018, showing NQINTELT outperforming.
blocks.caption: The Nasdaq CTA Artificial Intelligence Index from a total return standpoint (NQINTELT) significantly outperformed the S&P 500 TR Index — a strong signal of investor appetite for AI-related innovation.

blocks.headline: Innovation capacity hinges on infrastructure.
body: From cloud computing and data quality to business alignment and change management, success with AI is tied to first establishing a resilient, robust foundation.
blocks.attribution: Doug Hamilton — Head of AI Research and Engineering, Nasdaq

How Agentic AI is transforming financial crime investigations
Artificial Intelligence: Industry Report & Investment Case
Preparing a Data Foundation for AI Success

builders.headline: Builders at the edge.
builders.lede: The innovators reshaping human possibility didn't start as giants — they started with a vision. Nasdaq is home to the founders, leaders, and dreamers powering the AI economy — connecting them to the capital, markets, and systems that turn ambition into reality.

cards.text: The production and application of artificial and digital intelligence will revolutionize every industry and business, accelerating progress for all of us and helping us become more productive so we can build incredible things.

cells.imageAlt: Lunar surface with rocket against a starfield

cells.headline: Driving the future beyond Earth's orbit.
cells.body: Together with NASA and the private sector, we are creating markets that travel beyond Earth's orbit.

cells.imageAlt: Space industry team at the Nasdaq opening bell

cells.headline: Bold beginnings. Boundless frontiers.
cells.body: As America marks 250 years of bold ambition, Nasdaq is powering the next chapter of technological innovation — deep space exploration.

cells.imageAlt: Nasdaq MarketSite tower in Times Square

cells.headline: Where capital fuels space exploration.
cells.body: Through the capital markets, Nasdaq connects the innovators, engineers, and entrepreneurs building the space economy — from satellite infrastructure to commercial launch vehicles.

convergence.headline: Scaling the convergence economy.
convergence.lede: Through market technology, IPO pipelines, and data platforms, Nasdaq connects builders to the capital markets that power AI and emerging technologies at scale.

pillars.label: Connecting Capital
pillars.body: Connecting AI innovators to public markets to fuel growth.

pillars.label: Liquidity & Access
pillars.body: Providing deep, efficient markets that allow ideas to scale.

pillars.label: Governance & Trust
pillars.body: Delivering market transparency and oversight to sustain long-term confidence.

pillars.label: Market Infrastructure
pillars.body: Powering the technology, data, and platforms that connect markets and enable global growth.

blocks.headline: Nasdaq Metrio<sup>™</sup>
blocks.body: Collect, measure, communicate and disclose audit-grade ESG data to your stakeholders and one-to-many frameworks — all in one platform.
